title: Actually Camel
description: A mod that changes camels so they actually look like camels.
body:
Mojang said they would add camels, they added dromedaries. This mod fixes that.
Camels now have 2 humps and the seating position is also adjusted accordingly.

This mod should work clientside-only, but might interfere with some anticheat systems, so I recommend to install it on the server as well.
